headline: NYSE President Lynn Martin Joins U.S. Presidential Delegation for Historic Trump-Xi China Summit in Beijing
summary: BEIJING & SHANGHAI, May 15, 2026--The New York Stock Exchange, part of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced that NYSE Group President Lynn Martin joined the delegation of U.S. business leaders participating in President Trump’s historic state visit with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
